title: Position Paper on Regulating Fixed Point-to-Point Links and Point-to-Multipoint Systems
summary: Sets TRA policy for fixed point-to-point and point-to-multipoint radio systems used for backhaul, enterprise links and wireless digital infrastructure.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Position paper for fixed wireless links.
